channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Apple a fait une bourde ? L’iPhone 17e disparait du web
item.description: Seulement quelques heures après la publication de l'annonce de l'iPhone 17e, Apple semble faire disparaître son nouveau smartphone. L'annonce était une erreur ?

item.title: The four-star Bose QuietComfort Headphones offer 'flagship noise-cancelling for less' — and they're now even cheaper at Amazon
item.description: The Bose QuietComfort Headphones offer outstanding noise-cancelation and are now on sale for $229.99 at Amazon.

item.title: Anthropic's Claude can now absorb your past conversations with other AI chatbots
item.description: Anthropic has made switching to its Claude AI chatbot easier than ever. The company announced a new memory import tool that can extract all of a competing AI chatbot's memories and context of you into a text prompt that can be fed into Claude. With Anthropic's prompt, you can then copy and paste the output into Claude's memories, and the AI chatbot will pick up where you left off with another AI chatbot, whether it's ChatGPT, Gemini or Copilot. Anthropic said it'll take about 24 hours for Claude to assimilate the new context, but you'll be able to see the change by clicking on the "See what Cl...

item.title: Secure your business for less with 30% off LastPass plans
item.description: Deploy LastPass today and save 30%

item.title: On a vu le PC du futur de Lenovo et on n’était pas prêt
item.description: Le concept de PC modulaire que l'on a pu prendre en main chez Lenovo nous a vraiment tapé dans l’œil, et on vous explique pourquoi.

item.title: Herman Miller Modern Classics Sale! Save up to 25% on iconic furniture
item.description: Score rare discounts on Herman Miller furniture

item.title: Paramount Says It Will Merge HBO Max With Paramount Plus If the Warner Bros. Sale Goes Through
item.description: Meanwhile, Paramount CEO David Ellison: 'This is not about consolidation, it’s about reinventing the business.'

item.title: Microsoft gets heavy-handed on Copilot Discord server, reportedly blocking 'Microslop' posts and heading down a dangerous path
item.description: 'Microslop' posts are blocked on Copilot Discord server as Windows 11 AI backlash takes another unfortunate turn.

item.title: Crimson Desert : le RPG sud-coréen est-il le nouveau benchmark graphique de 2026 ?
item.description: En amont de sa sortie le 19 mars prochain, le très attendu RPG sud-coréen Crimson Desert se montre dans une impressionnante présentation technique.

item.title: Honor Magic Pad 4 : plus fine que l’iPad Pro, cette nouvelle tablette arrive avec 100 € de moins et des cadeaux offerts
item.description: Pour rivaliser avec les plus grands du marché, Honor sort sa Magic Pad 4. Une tablette qui se vante d'être la plus fine du monde. Elle est dotée d'un écran OLED 165 Hz ainsi que d'une puce Qualcomm puissante. Bonne nouvelle : la voilà déjà avec 100 euros de moins pour son lancement, avec quelques cadeaux offerts.

item.title: Apple iPhone 17e vs iPhone 16e : on a listé toutes les différences, de belles améliorations au menu
item.description: Apple renouvelle son modèle « e » avec l’iPhone 17e, qui reprend l’essentiel de l’iPhone 16e tout en introduisant une nouvelle puce, un modem plus rapide, davantage de stockage et l'arrivée du MagSafe. Comparatif.

item.title: Clap de fin pour HBO Max ?
item.description: Après le rachat de Warner Bros. par le groupe Paramount, les deux plateformes HBO Max et Paramount+ vont fusionner pour donner naissance à un géant du streaming.

item.title: Oppo veut reprendre sa couronne en France : le Find X9 Ultra arrive
item.description: Oppo annonce le lancement mondial de son Find X9 Ultra, le fleuron le plus ambitieux de la marque. La firme veut revenir au firmament en Europe.

item.title: Tarification dynamique de l’électricité : l’astuce ultime pour faire chuter sa facture d’électricité ou un piège à éviter ?
item.description: Les prix de l’électricité sur le marché de gros fluctuent quotidiennement, parfois fortement au point d’être négatifs. Un nouveau fournisseur en France propose ainsi aux particuliers de payer leur électricité aux tarifs réels du marché, afin de profiter des heures les moins chères. Mais attention, car la facture peut exploser, surtout si vous n'avez pas de batterie solaire. ...

item.title: Should you be using AI for performance reviews?
item.description: Here are four possible scenarios to consider. During the last decade, digital innovations have produced a range of recruitment and evaluation tools: now, whenever you first apply for a job, you are less likely to be judged by humans and more likely to be assessed by AI. Before you can even get the opportunity to impress a human interviewer, you will first need to impress the algorithm!...

item.title: Flight cancellations continue at airports in Dubai, Qatar, Abu Dhabi, and elsewhere as Iran war escalates
item.description: Airlines including Emirates, Qatar Airways, and Flydubai are scrambling to communicate guidance to passengers during the crisis. Here’s the latest. Following U.S. and Israeli strikes in Iran this weekend, airlines around the region and world have canceled thousands of flights amid continued conflict in the Middle East.

item.title: A married founder duo’s company, 14.ai, is replacing customer support teams at startups
item.description: 14.ai also launched a consumer brand to understand how much AI can handle customer support tasks.

item.title: AI conversations at Davos have sprinted ahead – we need to go back to basics
item.description: AI dominated Davos, but questions of reliability, trust and real-world impact remain unresolved.

item.title: Apple speeds up the iPad Air with an M4 upgrade, starting at $599
item.description: Apple refreshes the iPad Air with the M4 chip and more memory to make it better for AI use cases.

item.title: I just had an exclusive look at Fairphone’s report on the environmental impact of phones — it’s left me shocked
item.description: Even before it reaches your hands, Fairphones’s report shows a smartphone is pretty horrible for the environment.

item.title: Investigating the 61-pound machine that eats plastic and spits out bricks
item.description: As a kid, I went door to door collecting cans to earn some pocket change. Today, I still take pride in recycling. I slice cardboard boxes down to size each Sunday, and make sure every viable plastic container winds up in my family's recycling bins. Sometimes I even pull cellophane windows out of paper envelopes, […]

item.title: Zillow’s CEO on growing the company during a housing crisis
item.description: Today, I’m talking with Zillow CEO Jeremy Wacksman. Zillow is one of those apps that really exemplifies what you might call the smartphone era of software: the company built a great mobile app for looking at real estate listings, and it turned into not just entertainment for so many of us, but what has become […]

item.title: NYT Strands hints and answers for Tuesday, March 3 (game #730)
item.description: Looking for NYT Strands answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, including the spangram.

item.title: NYT Connections hints and answers for Tuesday, March 3 (game #996)
item.description: Looking for NYT Connections answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, plus my commentary on the puzzles.

item.title: ‘Sound by Bose’ earbuds for this money?! I’ve never said ‘Hello Moto’ with so much conviction!
item.description: Motorola just launched cheap earbuds with ‘Sound by Bose’, hi-res support, and spatial audio — and for this money, they're a no-brainer

item.title: Vérifier l’âge des internautes ? C’est dangereux et inefficace, selon ces chercheurs
item.description: Pour protéger les mineurs en ligne, plusieurs pays, dont la France, sont sur le point de contraindre les réseaux sociaux à mettre en place une vérification de l'âge. 371 universitaires alertent sur ces systèmes d'estimation de l'âge (via un selfie) ou de vérification de documents d'identité qui ne sont ni « fiables », ni « efficaces ». Au vu des « risques pour la sécurité et la vie privée en général », les professeurs et chercheurs demandent un moratoire, dans une lettre ouverte publiée ce lundi 2 mars....

item.title: Last chance! Google Pixel 10a preorders end soon — here's how to get the device for cheap
item.description: The Google Pixel 10a will officially be released this Thursday - don't miss out on these excellent preorder promotions.

item.title: Apple bakes in AI smarts into its new $599 iPhone 17e
item.description: The base model comes with 256 GB of storage, which Apple says is twice the entry storage from the previous generation at the same starting price.

item.title: C’est historique : pour la première fois, BYD vend plus de voitures à l’étranger qu’en Chine
item.description: BYD traverse une zone de turbulences sur son marché domestique comme de nombreux autres constructeurs chinois. Mais pendant que les ventes s'effondrent en Chine, BYD réalise une première historique : vendre plus de voitures à l'étranger que chez lui. Un paradoxe révélateur d'une stratégie offensive, mais aussi de fragilités structurelles.

item.title: Apple lance un nouvel iPad Air plus puissant, sans toucher à son prix
item.description: Le nouvel iPad Air embarque sans surprise une puce M4 avec la promesse de performances accrues pour une meilleure productivité.

item.title: Apple just announced the new M4 iPad Air, coming March 4 for $599
item.description: Ahead of its March 4 "special experience," Apple announced the imminent launch of the M4 iPad Air in 11- and 13-inch models.

item.title: What to expect at Apple's product launch event on March 4
item.description: Apple has scheduled a product launch event, dubbed an "Apple Experience", for March 4 at 9AM ET. The company is reportedly holding this event in NYC, London and Shanghai. Everyone loves shiny new products, so what can we expect to see at Apple's first launch event of 2026? We don't know anything for certain, but we have plenty of educated guesses that have been sourced from industry reports and speculation from analysts. Editor's Note (on March 2 at 9:45AM ET): Apple has officially announced the iPhone 17e and iPad Air (M4). It's expected to continue to unveil new hardware in the following day...

item.title: Apple’s iPad Air Gets an M4 Upgrade for the Same Starting Price
item.description: New chip, but it's the same $599 for the 11-inch model and $799 for the 13-inch model.

item.title: Apple's big March launches live — all the latest news from iPhone 17e to M4 iPad Air
item.description: Apple's big wave of March announcements has kicked off — starting with the new iPhone 17e and M4 iPad Air. Here's all the latest news live.

item.title: La Switch Lite revient en forte promotion : de quoi jouer à toute la ludothèque de Nintendo sans se ruiner
item.description: La Nintendo Switch Lite est une version uniquement portable de la Switch première du nom, à retrouver à 140,51 euros au lieu de 199 euros grâce à un code promo sur AliExpress.

item.title: Apple Gives the iPad Air a Small Power Boost
item.description: The iPad Air enjoys a relatively modest update with the M4 chip and 12 gigabytes of RAM.

item.title: ‘Your Rich BFF’ Vivian Tu shares her top 4 personal finance tips
item.description: Tu started her TikTok account in 2021, which now has 2.7 million followers. Are you intimidated by personal finance? Vivian Tu wants to help.Tu is known for her TikTok account, “Your Rich BFF,” where she makes entertaining videos about personal finance. Topics include how to negotiate your salary and practical tips for dealing with credit card debt. Tu, who refers to herself as “your favorite Wall Street girly,” has 10 million followers on social media and has published two personal finance books.Tu, born and raised in Baltimore, often connects her interest in personal finance to her upbringin...

item.title: Oscars race heats up as ‘Sinners’ takes top prize at SAG Actor Awards
item.description: The guild’s awards are one of the most closely watched precursors to the Academy Awards. After a near awards-season sweep by “One Battle After Another,” “Sinners” won best ensemble at the Screen Actors Guild’s 32nd Actor Awards on Sunday, shaking up the Oscar race and setting up a potential nail-biter finale in two weeks at the Academy Awards.The guild’s awards, formerly known as the SAG Awards, are one of the most closely watched Oscar precursors. Actors make up the largest slice of the Academy of Motion Picture Arts and Sciences and their choices at the Actor Awards often align.The victory f...

item.title: The First Trailer for ‘Scary Movie 6’ Is Here to Eat Horror’s Lunch Again
item.description: Whether you're a horror series new or old, no one is safe from the legendary movie parody franchise this time.

item.title: Sonos could finally be making good on its 'two products per year' pledge — if this Sonos AirPlay 2 speaker leak proves legit, I think it'll be the perfect mid-range portable buy
item.description: Best Buy Canada leaked an unannounced Sonos Bluetooth speaker, and it could be the perfect mid-range device we've been waiting for.

item.title: Apple just announced a new iPad Air with M4 — here's what's changed
item.description: Apple has announced a new iPad Air that now features the M4 chip alongside the N1 and C1X.

item.title: The Samsung Wallet can now hold your house keys
item.description: Samsung's newest feature turns your phone into your house keys. The company has created the Digital Home Key, a feature inside of the Samsung Wallet that should let you unlock any compatible smart door with your phone. The Samsung Wallet already offered digital car keys. "As we continue to evolve Samsung Wallet, delivering trusted mobile experiences remains at the core of our innovation," Woncheol Chai, EVP and head of Digital Wallet Team, Mobile eXperience (MX) Business at Samsung Electronics, said in a statement. "Through close collaboration with our partners and in alignment with the Aliro...

item.title: Apple Announces iPhone 17e With the One Feature the iPhone 16e Should Have Had
item.description: No, it's not a second rear camera.

item.title: Vibe coding service Lovable accused of hosting malware-ridden apps exposing thousands of users — it says they should take more care
item.description: Vibe coding isn't going anywhere, but developers are being urged to check for vulnerabilities on the basis that the code may work, but insecurely.

item.title: Tecnos got the most modular phone ever
item.description: Tecno brought a magnetic modular phone, as well as a neon-lit phone, to MWC Barcelona this year.

item.title: How OpenAI caved to the Pentagon on AI surveillance
item.description: On Friday evening, amidst fallout from a standoff between the Department of Defense and Anthropic, OpenAI CEO Sam Altman announced that his own company had successfully negotiated new terms with the Pentagon. The US government had just moved to blacklist Anthropic for standing firm on two red lines for military use: no mass surveillance of […]

item.title: Apple introduces the $599 iPhone 17e with MagSafe and twice the storage
item.description: Apple has just announced the addition of the iPhone 17e to its smartphone lineup. This model is kitted with the same A19 chip that powers the base iPhone 17, and it will support the Apple Intelligence suite of AI tools. As the rumors suggested, the iPhone 17e will indeed be priced at $599, same as last year’s iPhone 16e. The base model will come with 256GB of storage, and also be available in a new pink color. The iPhone 16e was missing a few elements that are now being added to the 17e, most notably MagSafe charging at Qi2 speeds. This means it can charge wirelessly at 15W compared to the 7.5...

item.title: Rural health’s $50 billion tech transformation: Too fast to last
item.description: Rural health’s $50 billion tech transformation: Too fast to last The Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services (CMS) just placed a $50 billion bet on rural healthcare, but the odds are not in its favor. CMS, now led by Mehmet Oz, MD, created the Rural Health Transformation Program to help the 60 million Americans in rural areas have better access to care, modernize facilities and technologies, and support innovation that brings “high-quality, dependable care closer to home.”...

item.title: Apple updates the iPad Air with an M4 chip
item.description: Apple is kicking off multiple days of product announcements this morning with a new iPad Air. Unsurprisingly, it’s more or less like the iPad Air Apple announced one year ago, except it now has an M4 chip instead of last year’s M3.Apple is also including its in-house networking chips, the N1 and C1X, which will cover Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, Thread and cellular connectivity. This means the iPad Air supports the Wi-Fi 7 standard for the first time. The Air also now has 12GB of RAM standard, up from 8GB in the prior model. The rest of the iPad Air appears unchanged at this point. It has the same displa...

item.title: Apple dévoile l’iPad Air M4, une tablette encore plus puissante à un tarif réduit
item.description: L'iPad Air passe la 4e : la tablette la plus fine du portefeuille Apple intègre la puce M4 ainsi que les dernières normes de connectivité, pour le même tarif que le modèle précédent.

item.title: Disney+ en mars 2026 : voici les films et séries à ne pas manquer, dont la toute nouvelle adaptation de Lucky Luke
item.description: Un pauvre cow-boy solitaire, le retour du justicier de Hell's Kitchen, un aventurier galactique et un flic à Los Angeles... Voici les films et séries à ne pas manquer sur Disney+ en mars 2026.

item.title: Hackers and internet outages hit Iran amid U.S. air strikes
item.description: Users of a popular Iranian prayer app were flooded with phone notifications as U.S. air strikes hit Iran's biggest cities, killing the country's leader.

item.title: Apple lance l’iPhone 17e : puce A19, MagSafe et 256 Go de base, est-ce suffisant ?
item.description: L'an dernier, Apple abandonnait définitivement l'iPhone SE pour tenter quelque chose de nouveau, histoire d'occuper le segment de l'entrée de gamme (tout étant relatif). Bonne pioche : l'iPhone 16e, malgré un prix bien plus élevé que son prédécesseur plus ou moins direct, s'est révélé être un succès. Le constructeur creuse le même sillon avec l'iPhone 17e tout juste présenté....

item.title: Apple annonce l’iPhone 17e : une bonne surprise à la clé
item.description: Apple débute sa semaine d'annonces avec l'attendu iPhone 17e. Sans surprise, il s'agit d'une petite mise à jour de l'iPhone le moins cher de la marque.

item.title: How small businesses can win in the AI era
item.description: As AI reshapes consumer discovery, small businesses can prepare themselves to get discovered and gain consumer trust.

item.title: The Nothing Phone 4a will be available in pink, and we have pictures and a video
item.description: Nothing has revealed a new color for its upcoming Nothing Phone 4a.

item.title: Nothing Phone 4a gets an official launch date
item.description: Nothing is launching its new affordable smartphone during the Mobile World Congress this year.

item.title: Nothing teases Headphone (a) ahead of launch
item.description: The Headphone (a) will be the brand's first over-ear headphone.

item.title: Apple's Budget iPhone 17e Gets a MagSafe Upgrade
item.description: Building on the iPhone 16e from 2025, Apple's latest iPhone has a few noteworthy upgrades with the same $599 price.

item.title: Apple announces the iPhone 17e — here's what's new in the mid-range iPhone
item.description: Apple has announced the iPhone 17e, its new entry-level iPhone. Here's what's new and how it compares to its iPhone 16e predecessor.

item.title: Apple announces the iPhone 17E
item.description: Apple has taken the wraps off the iPhone 17E, its latest entry-level smartphone. The iPhone 17E starts at $599 with a higher 256GB of storage, and is available in black, white, and pink. The company revealed the new device as part of a series of announcements that kicked off this week. Similar to the iPhone […]

item.title: ‘God of War’ Star Responds to First Look Backlash
item.description: Plus, how the new 'Carrie' will update its trauma for the modern age.

item.title: Pico’s Project Swan XR Headset Wants to Go Where the Apple Vision Pro Failed
item.description: The ByteDance company wants to make the case that XR is “not just for gaming” anymore by giving you a digital office.

item.title: Apple launches a new iPad Air with an upgraded M4 processor
item.description: After updating its mid-level tablets last year, Apple has announced a new version of the iPad Air today now powered by the company's M4 processor. That's the same processor found in the 7th-generation iPad Pro as well as MacBook Pro and Mac mini models that debuted in 2024. The new iPad Air with M4 is […]

item.title: MyFitnessPal has acquired Cal AI, the viral calorie app built by teens
item.description: After wooing Cal AI for months, MyFitnessPal has successfully acquired its up-and-coming rival, Cal AI, the app built by teens soaring on the apps stores.

item.title: Parade’s Cami Tellez announces new creator economy marketing platform, $4M in funding
item.description: Cami Tellez announces launch of new company, $4 million raise.

item.title: Young Sherlock review: TV’s most famous detective is finally more than just a canny crime solver in this electric new Prime Video show
item.description: Young Sherlock on Prime Video proves it’s still possible to reinvent an old classic — or that you need Guy Ritchie to make it unforgettable.

item.title: What is the release date for Scrubs season 10 episode 3 on Hulu and Disney+?
item.description: Scrubs season 10's next episode will be out shortly — here's when and where you can watch it.

item.title: 'This is what we get to replace Yellowstone? No thanks!': Taylor Sheridan spinoff Marshals slammed by fans as 'predictable cop show' after episode 1 premiere
item.description: We're one episode into Marshals: A Yellowstone Story, and it's safe to say the new CBS and Paramount+ show isn't getting the expected reaction.

item.title: Hands-on: The irresistible cuteness of Pokémon Pokopia, my favorite Pokémon game in years
item.description: 'Pokémon Pokopia' is not at all the kind of game I'd normally become obsessed with, but its charms and depth have enraptured me.
